metodos.codigoOriginal:
Lparameters pPro

lcQuery = [Select b.Descricaos ] + ;
			[From SigCdPro a, SigCdPsg b ] + ;
		   [Where a.Cpros = '] + pPro + [' And ] + ;
		   		 [a.CGrus = b.CGrus And ] + ;
		   		 [a.SGrus = b.Codigos]

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, [LocalSgru]) < 1)
	=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Conexăo (Processamento - LocalSgru)])
	Return .f.
EndIf
Go Top In LocalSgru
If Not Eof([LocalSgru])
	Replace DescSgrus With LocalSgru.Descricaos In crDados
EndIf

ThisForm.poDataMgr.Release
ThisForm.poDataMgr2.Release

Set Point To '.'
Set Separator To ','

lcArq = Sys(2023) + [\] + ThisForm.ImgBranco
If File(lcArq)
	Delete File &lcArq.
EndIf

lcArq = Sys(2023) + [\] + ThisForm.ImgLogotipo
If File(lcArq)
	Delete File &lcArq.
EndIf

lcArq = Sys(2023) + [\] + ThisForm.ImgTecnicas

EndIf

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select CItens as Itens, CPros as Produtos, Reffs as Referencia, ; 	   Padr(DPros, 254) as Descricao, CUnis as Uni, Qtds, ; 	   Units as Unitario, Moedas as Moeda, Totas as Total, Aliqs as Aliquota, ; 	   ValIpis as Ipis, Obs ; From crDados ; Where Not Empty(CPros) ; Into Cursor crExcel
